```html
<wje-input label="Základný input"></wje-input>
<wje-input label="Input s placeholderom" placeholder="Enter company name"></wje-input>
<wje-input label="Input s predvyplnenou hodnotou" value="Mlynské Nivy 71"></wje-input>
<wje-input label="Input iba na čítanie" value="Bratislava" readonly></wje-input>
<wje-input label="Vypnutý input" value="84103" disabled></wje-input>
<wje-input label="Povinný input s typom number a custom chybovou hláškou" type="number" minlength="5" message="Toto je moja chybová hláška" required validate-on-change custom-error-display ></wje-input>
```
